creator: sven.a.jonsson@bahnhof.se
text:
I just added
WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=yes
to poudriere's make.conf, and ccache (and sccache) started working again.
13.0 and 13.1 didn't need this for ccache to work with poudriere.
Is this new for 13.2? Is it documented somewhere that I didn't look?
Anyway, I think this issue can be closed.
